## Checklist

- [ ] `just fmt` (or `gofmt -w .`) run
- [ ] `just lint` passes
- [ ] `just race` passes
- [ ] `just docs-build` passes if docs changed
- [ ] Tests added or updated for behavior changes
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `## [Unreleased]` if user-facing
